Contact Me

For questions about the workshop material, repository organization, or the notebooks, feel free to get in touch.

Contact

  • Email: mfj@cin.ufpe.br
  • GitHub: github.com/manuelfjr

Notes

If you are using this material during the workshop, the fastest path is usually:

  • check the roadmap page first;
  • open the section notebook;
  • move to the corresponding activity;
  • return to the answer page only after the discussion window is over.
